name: Busch Gardens Tampa Bay
description: Busch Gardens Tampa Bay is a 335 acre animal theme park located in Tampa, Florida, United States, with the entire park landscaped and designed around themes of Africa.  Owned and operated by United Parks & Resorts, the park opened on March 31, 1959.  The park has an annual attendance consistently exceeding 4 million, often ranking second among United Parks & Resorts parks behind SeaWorld Orlando.
imageAttribution: A view of the Serengeti Plains in 2006
